aircraft.name: F-4B Phantom II
notes: If Armed Escort, AIM-7E/E-2 is 5, otherwise 3

aircraft.name: F-4J Phantom II
notes: If Armed Escort, AIM-7E/E-2 is 5, otherwise 3

aircraft.name: F-4N Phantom II
notes: If Armed Escort, AIM-7E-2 is 5, otherwise 3

aircraft.name: F-8C/D Crusader
notes: Only Armed Escort can carry rockets

aircraft.name: F-8E/H/J Crusader
notes: AIM-9C is available from Jul 66 to Dec 67

aircraft.name: A-6A Intruder
notes: If Blind bombing, Sight is +3, otherwise +0

aircraft.name: A-6B Intruder
notes: If Shrike is 2 and Standard A or B is carried, Bomb is 0
Standard A is available from Mar 68+
Standard B is available from Apr 68+

aircraft.name: A-6C Intruder
notes: If Blind bombing, Sight is +3, otherwise +0

aircraft.name: F-14A Tomcat
notes: if no AIM-54 carried, AIM-7E-2 is 1

aircraft.name: F-4C Phantom II
notes: After May 67+, Gun only on CAP
If SEAD or Strike/CAP, AIM-7E/E-2 is 5, otherwise 3

aircraft.name: F-4D Phantom II
notes: If Bomb or SEAD or Strike/CAP or Chaff, AIM-7E/E-2 is 5, otherwise 3
Chaff Disp is available from Jun 72+
Chaff Bomb is available from May 72+

aircraft.name: F-4E Phantom II
notes: If Bomb or SEAD or Strike/CAP or Chaff, AIM-7E/E-2 is 5, otherwise 3
Chaff Disp is available from Jun 72+
Chaff Bomb is available from May 72+

aircraft.name: F-105D Thunderchief
notes: AIM-9B is available only by SSR

aircraft.name: F-105F Wild Weasel III
notes: Standard A is available from May 68+

aircraft.name: F-105G Wild Weasel (2)
notes: Standard A is available from May 68+
Standard B is available from Jan 69+
